hero.name: Atelier
hero.tagline: A directory of design and development studios we’d hire ourselves
hero.description: Hand-vetted independent agencies and studios that the StoicSoft team has either hired, partnered with, or watched ship for years. No paid placements, ever.

items.name: StoicSoft Studio
items.description: Twelve people across Lisbon, Madrid, and Lagos. We build software for small teams that want to ship like a small team. Maker of ServerCompass, Aether, and 1DevTool.

items.name: Northframe Creative
items.description: A 12-person studio focused on quiet, editorial-leaning brand systems and high-performance marketing sites. Long-time StoicSoft creative collaborator.

items.name: Lumen Research
items.description: A research collective we partner with on every major Aether feature. Quiet, careful work — long calls, longer transcripts, sharp memos.

items.name: Tessera Engineering
items.description: When ServerCompass needs help on the data plane, Tessera is who we call. Three engineers, ten years of Postgres + Kafka in production.

items.name: Orbital Product Design
items.description: Six product designers who pair-program their own components. They designed the Aether dashboard refresh in 2025.

items.name: Halo Mobile
items.description: A two-person mobile collective that built the Halo iOS app for the StoicSoft team. They write Swift like it’s a craft, not a job.

items.name: Field & Form Editorial
items.description: An editorial outfit that helps quiet companies sound quiet. They write the words on most StoicSoft surfaces, and edit our magazine.

items.name: Parallel Launches
items.description: A small team that has run the launch week for three of our products. They make 60-second films and the email sequences that follow.

items.name: Kiln Motion
items.description: Four-person motion studio. They produced the Aether explainer film and the Helix product reveal. Fast, restrained, on-brand.

items.name: Open Roots Communications
items.description: The communications partner for Open Roots. They’re a one-person studio and the only growth firm we recommend for nonprofit work.

items.name: Elena Faro Photo
items.description: Elena’s commercial side. She’s shot the founder portraits and field photography for half of the StoicSoft surfaces.

items.name: Ribeiro Bindery
items.description: The family bindery in Porto that makes the Field notebooks. They take on small print runs for studios who want a real object.
